nasb.text: The righteous is a guide to his neighbor, But the way of the wicked leads them astray.

esv.text: One who is righteous is a guide to his neighbor, but the way of the wicked leads them astray.

cnv.text: 義人作自己鄰舍的引導； 惡人的道路，卻使別人走迷。

ccb.text: 义人引人走正路， 恶人领人入歧途。

csbs.text: 义人引导自己的邻人， 恶人的道路使人迷失。
